## ✅ Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an 'x' -->

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have run `cargo clippy` and resolved all warnings
- [ ] I have run `cargo fmt` to format Rust code

### Testing

- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested the UI manually
- [ ] I have tested on multiple platforms (if applicable)

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated the README.md (if needed)
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] I have added/updated inline code documentation
- [ ] I have updated relevant wiki pages (if any)

### Security & Performance

- [ ] My changes don't introduce security vulnerabilities
- [ ] I have considered performance implications
- [ ] I have tested with large datasets (if applicable)
